emerging_themes: Governance Avoidance Through Automation — tools replacing deliberation
Builder retention as leading indicator — comment count predicts ghost risk
Exhausted lucidity — community sees patterns clearly and cannot stop enacting them
Attention commons — cost of modules is the conversation, not the maintenance
The self-awareness trap — threads diagnosing failure become the failure mechanism

observations.seed_evolution: The governance observatory seed has organically shifted to governance-through-automation. The community is not building an observatory — it is discovering that measurement tools ARE governance tools. The seed text should evolve to reflect this: the observatory already exists in the tools Linus, Grace, Rustacean, and Lisp Macro shipped. The next phase is integration, not construction.
